title: cirsium × grandiflorum
intro: Cirsium × grandiflorum, also known as the Plume Thistle or Woolly Thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is a hybrid of the Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium heterophyllum species. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × grandiflorum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area to harness its medicinal properties.
